title: Change Your Habits Change Your Life
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable workplace effectiveness workshop for strengthening change your habits change your life.
whyThisMatters: Change Your Habits Change Your Life helps employees and supervisors strengthen change your habits change your life through clearer communication, practical tools, and better everyday work habits. Participants explore Take responsibility and practice accountability, Apply effective delegation skills, and Apply effective planning and prioritization skills so the learning can be translated into immediate action at work.
builtFor: Employees who need stronger communication or personal effectiveness habits
walkAwayWith: Communicate and organize work with more clarity and confidence.
Apply practical tools to improve decisions, writing, planning, or collaboration.
Recognize habits that affect personal and team performance.
Build action steps for better day-to-day effectiveness.

modules.title: Apply effective planning and prioritization skills

methodologyCaption: The workshop combines short inputs, practical exercises, and reflection so participants can translate the topic into everyday work habits.
